"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test1test1.cpp.dir/objects.a
D:\tool\c\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test1test1.cpp.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test1test1.cpp.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\tool\c\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test1test1.cpp.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test1test1.cpp.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest1test1.cpp.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test1test1.cpp.dir\linkLibs.rsp
